arclight.title: Arclight
arclight.instructions: Click a cell to reveal the gem inside. Click border circles to fire waves and discover where they exit and what color they carry.

orapaMine.title: Orapa Mine
orapaMine.instructions: Click a cell to reveal the gem inside. Click border circles to fire waves and discover where they exit and what color they carry.

orapaSpace.title: Orapa Space
orapaSpace.instructions: Click a cell to reveal the planet inside. Click border circles to fire waves and discover where they exit and what color they carry.

switchboard.title: Switchboard
switchboard.instructions: Click a tile to rotate it and change the paths. Click the right half to rotate clockwise, left half to rotate counter-clockwise. Your goal is to connect the start and end points.
